collision_resolution_records.conflict: PAT-001 (Isomorphic Bridge) claims structural mappings are universal; PAT-006 (Topological Orthogonality) claims high-value bridges only emerge at orthogonal intersections
collision_resolution_records.resolution: Twinning: Universal bridges exist on the adjacency spectrum; maximum value bridges emerge specifically at orthogonal intersections where LLM heuristics fail. PAT-001 remains valid for adjacent mappings; PAT-006 governs maximal emergent yield.
collision_resolution_records.outcome: Both patterns retained with domain-conditional activation logic.

collision_resolution_records.conflict: PAT-007 (Lexical Saponification) implies high-entropy esoteric terms must be used sparingly; PAT-003 (Workflow Narrowing) shows all terms decay under sequential chain pressure
collision_resolution_records.resolution: Saponification rate λ differs by term frequency in pre-training corpus. Esoteric terms have lower λ (~0.05) vs. common epistemic terms (~0.23). +++AutonymicIsolate applies semiotic sandbox to reset decay independently of chain depth.
collision_resolution_records.outcome: PAT-007 refined with term-class-conditional decay constants.

collision_resolution_records.conflict: PAT-009 (TDA as Hallucination Detector) requires O(n³) exact computation; PAT-005 (PHR) requires real-time detection
collision_resolution_records.resolution: Phronesis Index Φ (spectral approximation of Sheaf Laplacian) reduces complexity to O(n log n). Full TDA deployed only at EpistemicEscrow trigger; Φ serves as continuous fast-path monitor.
collision_resolution_records.outcome: Two-speed detection architecture: Φ for continuous monitoring; Persistent Homology for full post-escrow audit.

collision_resolution_records.conflict: PAT-008 (Stigmergy) requires shared environmental medium; LLM swarms operate in isolated context windows
collision_resolution_records.resolution: Shared scratchpad with CRDT-based conflict resolution serves as the 'pheromone medium'. Symbolic Scars encoded as VSA hypervectors (PAT-010) function as the mathematical equivalent of repulsive pheromone gradients.
collision_resolution_records.outcome: Stigmergy-STA integration: PAT-008 ↔ PAT-010 composite pattern for LLM swarm applications.

collision_resolution_records.conflict: PAT-002 (Paraconsistent Scarring) stores contradictions as opportunities; PAT-004 (Epistemic Mirror Trap) shows contradictions cause agent loops
collision_resolution_records.resolution: Resolution depends on Tier level. In Tier 2 (single-agent ReAct), contradictions trigger Algorithmic Shame without PAL2v protection. In Tier 3 (community CTGA), PAL2v elevates contradictions to Symbolic Scars. Tier level is the activating condition.
collision_resolution_records.outcome: Tier-conditional activation logic added to both PAT-002 and PAT-004.
